entities.name: Jacob
entities.context: Collaborator who shared observations about organizational happiness and cultural change

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that provides career coaching

entities.name: Organizational Happiness Paradox
entities.context: Insight that smaller autonomous teams provide both better experience AND better opportunity when combined with AI leverage

entities.name: Small Autonomous Teams
entities.context: Mission-aligned working structure that correlates with higher employee happiness

entities.name: AI Leverage
entities.context: The amplification of output capacity through AI tools, enabling small teams to match large org output

entities.name: Cultural Change Precedes Technical Change
entities.context: Principle that adoption barriers are mental/cultural rather than technical

entities.name: Mindset Shift
entities.context: Moving from scarcity/specialization thinking to leverage/generalism thinking

entities.name: First-Mover Advantage
entities.context: Competitive edge goes to orgs that change culture fastest, not those with best tools

relationships.context: Noted that people are happier on small autonomous teams
Emphasized shifting organizational instinct from headcount to AI creativity
AI leverage enables small teams to have output capacity previously requiring large orgs
Shifts coaching narrative from big company optimization to meaningful leveraged roles
Coaching on mindset change is more valuable than tool training
Fast cultural change creates competitive advantage over technical capability
